parsed.availability_comment: Available and in squad, but expected mostly as reserve cover.
parsed.availability_note: No injury/absence signal found; listed in GT 2026 squad for the opening phase.
parsed.followup_reason: Recent squad and player comments consistently indicate reserve wicketkeeper-batter role behind Jos Buttler.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Crowded by Buttler as main keeper plus Banton/Kushagra as backup options.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; overseas cap does not constrain him. Selection pressure comes from keeper/top-order depth.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Retained domestic backup keeper-batter; Buttler remains first-choice keeper and GT also added Banton, with Kushagra in reserve.
